Let me search the web for that.

To find the latest movies, you can check out [Movies at AMC | View Showtimes & Get Tickets to New Movies in ...], which provides information on currently showing films and new releases coming soon to AMC Theatres. You can also view showtimes, purchase tickets, or set reminders for upcoming titles.

Additionally, for a broader perspective, consider visiting [New Movies Out Now & In Theaters 2026 | Fandango], where you'll find a list of various films, including those set to release in the near future.

For popular movies currently attracting attention, refer to [30 Most Popular Movies Right Now: What to Watch In Theaters and ...], which highlights films that are trending among audiences across theaters and streaming platforms. 

If you’re looking for something unique or unusual, check out reviews or trailers for recent releases like "The Last House," which has received mixed reactions regarding its style.
